name: haki-ya-kazi-mcp
description: MCP server for Kenya labour rights — minimum wages, dismissal guidance, maternity/paternity rights, trade unions, Labour Relations Court, NSSF/NHIF rights. 5 tools. 1st world equivalent: ACAS / NLRB.

tools.name: minimum_wage_lookup
tools.description: Kenya minimum wage by sector and county

tools.name: unfair_dismissal_guide
tools.description: Unfair dismissal rights and remedies under Kenya Employment Act

tools.name: maternity_paternity_rights
tools.description: Maternity and paternity leave rights in Kenya

tools.name: trade_union_directory
tools.description: Kenya trade union directory and workers' rights organizations

tools.name: labour_court_guide
tools.description: Labour Relations Court and Employment and Labour Relations Court guidance
